text:
life will be the happiest. According to another
view the grouping must be done not with Pisces as the starting
R&Ji, but with the one that happens to be the 12th from the

ASTAKAVARGA 285
Lagna RaSi. According to that you will have to begin with
Kumbha in our example chart. According to that calculation
the three groups will have in order 112, 113 and 112 benefic
dots. There is yet another view : You should not take into
consideration the benefic dots occurring in the Rasis that
represent the 8th and 12th Bhavas. If this view is accepted,
we will have to make a fresh calculation. In our chart Tula
and Kumbha are the Rasis to be avoided. Then we would
get according to the first method, 110, 87 and 86 respectively,
and according to the other 84, 113 and 86. In the same manner
you will have to find out which group has the greatest number
of benefic planets and which malefic ones. According to this
the period of life of the native will be happy or otherwise, as the
case may be.
